options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies an area in which to replace vias.

options.name: -at
options.description: Specifies the coordinates for the origin of a via to replace.

options.name: -cut_class
options.description: Specifies the cut class for vias

options.name: -from
options.description: Specifies a via or list of vias to replace.

options.name: -net
options.description: Specifies the net name on which to changes vias ((net), optional)

options.name: -selected
options.description: Specifies whether to replace vias for selected ones only

options.name: -signal_only
options.description: Specifies whether signal vias only or signal and special vias are changes.

options.name: -to
options.description: Specifies a via or a list of vias to replace the vias indicated by the -from parameter.
